programme.title: Finally Found Someone

programme.title: Maria Went To Town
programme.desc: Although triplets are separated at birth due to a number of chaotic instances, the siblings cross paths and reunite 20 years later after one of them gets involved in a hilarious mess.

programme.title: Weder-Weder Lang Yan

programme.title: Sta. Niña

programme.title: Sa Kabilugan ng Buwan
programme.desc: A young, mysterious woman befriends three teenage boys who are eventually infatuated by her charm, unaware of her secret that might cost them their lives.

programme.title: Corazon: Ang Unang Aswang
programme.desc: In desperation, Corazón and Daniel resort to mystic rituals to have a child. When their child dies, Corazón gets revenge by inflicting pain on others.

programme.title: Ang tange kong pag-Ibig

programme.title: Ang Joker At Ang Pistolero

programme.title: Can We Still Be Friends?

programme.title: Si Malakas at Si Maganda

programme.title: Captain Barbell
programme.desc: A janitor (Ogie Alcasid) who has a crush on a teacher (Regine Velasquez) turns into a superhero.

programme.title: Zaldong Tisoy
programme.desc: Zaldo plans to kill Donya Pacita because of her cruelty towards her countrymen. However, his plan falters when he discovers her true personality.

programme.title: Daddy Goon
programme.desc: Sergeant Santisima, a kindhearted policeman, vows to save his children and the other squatters from the cruelty of the owner of the land they all live on.

programme.title: White Lady
programme.desc: A college girl is being followed by a white specter. To discover why the spirit is so tortured, the student delves into the history of her school and uncovers secrets that may have drastic consequences.

programme.title: America's Got Talent S21
programme.desc: With an army of loyal fans eager to find out what’s in store, America’s Got Talent returns to screens this year with more diverse talent, show-stopping moments and incredible drama than ever before.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel Of Fortune S4
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: The story involves Maverick confronting his past while training a group of younger Top Gun graduates, including the son of his deceased best friend, for a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Chicago Fire S14
programme.desc: The brave crew of Firehouse 51 puts their lives on the line to protect and rescue the people of their city.

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: Imani struggles to maintain her composure when a new lead reignites her investigation into her sister's disappearance.

programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. With the first immunity pin of the season on the line, protecting both the winning home cook and their region, the kitchen erupts into chaos and panic. One competitor ultimately faces elimination.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud S11
programme.desc: It's comedian Matt Rife and family versus rapper Lil Jon and family, and singer and actress Kat Graham and family versus actress Francia Raisa and family.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: When RV-lifestyle couple James and Michelle Butler go missing while camping along the southern coast of Texas, the discovery of human remains leads authorities to embark on an international manhunt to bring the fugitives to justice.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: When a body is discovered along the Eel River, Sheriff Mickey Fox and her team launch a homicide investigation that rattles the heart of Edgewater.

programme.title: Fire Country S4
programme.desc: Station 42 responds to a dangerous fire at a beloved local smokehouse where Jake is forced to confront memories of his late father and the place they once shared.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they have to pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. With the first immunity pin of the season on the line, protecting both the winning home cook and their region, the kitchen erupts into chaos and panic. One competitor ultimately faces elimination.

programme.title: Matlock S1
programme.desc: As Olympia and Julian get a second shot at a case regarding a tragic death due to contaminated baby formula, their past work on the investigation gives glimpses into what led to their divorce. Matty’s overwhelming stress causes her to consider quitting.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: When RV-lifestyle couple James and Michelle Butler go missing while camping along the southern coast of Texas, the discovery of human remains leads authorities to embark on an international manhunt to bring the fugitives to justice.

programme.title: Shark Tank S16

programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. But when the animals go wild in the snow, Melman’s future-paramedic skills are put to the test during an outbreak of stubbed toes and boo-boos. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Every Bite Takes You Home
programme.desc: Share in the journeys of 16 remarkable asylum seekers who have found a home in Australia. Each person's unique story, blended with the memories of their favourite recipes and traditions, reminds us that food can unite us all.

programme.title: Loving Gluten Free
programme.desc: Helen swaps out breadcrumbs for quinoa to make a favourite, crisby gluten free crumbed chicken. Helen then heads to 'Saba's Ethiopian Restaurant' in Fitzroy to learn about gluten free options in Ethiopian cooking.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Compass
programme.desc: For decades, New Yorker Fran Lebowitz has made a career out of skewering modern life with wit, precision and zero mercy. Benjamin Law sits down with Lebowitz to ask: how does she make sense of what we are witnessing unfold?

programme.title: Culture By Design
programme.desc: Design has the power to bring people together, solve local challenges, and foster shared experiences. Discover how community influences design with stories from Mumbai, Central Java and Yogyakarta.

programme.title: I Was Actually There
programme.desc: When nightclub singer Fairlie Arrow disappeared from her Gold Coast home in 1991, the tabloid media went to town. Arrow was reported as abducted by "an obsessed fan". Spoiler alert: it was all a hoax.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: Parkinson In Australia
programme.desc: Michael Parkinson interviews guest Shane Warne.

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: Ashes history is littered with moments that have defined and intensified the rivalry between the two nations. Jim Maxwell and Corbin Middlemas look back to 2006 when Shane Warne bowled Australia to a series win in Adelaide.

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: Jim Maxwell bowls an over of memories with his six favourite Ashes Moments. The final one comes from 2005 at Edgbaston, as England claimed an astonishing victory that spawned the iconic Brett Lee/Andrew Flintoff photo.

programme.title: Insiders
programme.desc: Since 2001, Insiders has been the premier destination for political news, analysis and discussion. Patricia Karvelas and a panel of leading commentators cut through the noise with questions and analysis on the week's issues.

programme.title: Offsiders
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel discuss the week in sport including the FIFA World Cup Final, the Wallabies v Italy, AFL, NRL, NRLW, and the final countdown to the start of the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow.

programme.title: News Breakfast

programme.title: News Breakfast

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When Elle, a sorority queen, is dumped by her boyfriend as he plans to go to law school, she enrols in the same school to win him back. However, she discovers that there is more to her than her looks.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Tarantula

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions

Even the Novas' home base, Luna Port has become a major space station, home to entire new fields of science and learning. Still, despite all their incredible adventures, the Novas' greatest quest is ahead of them they've just been invited to visit the Stardustian homeworld!

programme.title: Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Croods and the Bettermans join forces to create a new community. An us against the world, cave-person co-op on the most amazing farm in the history of prehistory!

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 19
programme.desc: Leonardo discovers the book of world records and is determined to be one of those champions. Leonardo began to attempt various world records and with the help of Zachary. Meanwhile, Mr Hanis has taken the day off and asks Neela to go for a walk in the park. Neela is at the park with Mr Han and he seems very happy to be around her. Neela is shocked. Mr Han wants her as a girlfriend!?!

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 20
programme.desc: Neela is expressing dissatisfaction with being stuck in the apartment. She's done all the research into human behaviour and is ready to get out into the world. She decides she is getting a job! But Neela knows something that they don't. She has been in touch with Uncle Maxie from Zetabia and he's decided that he doesn't need 2 officers wrangling Raffles. One of them can return to Zetabia.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 34
programme.desc: Bosnia and Herzegovina had to build a football identity from nothing, while the nation was rebuilding around them.co, and Canada unite to stage sport’s biggest event of 2026.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 13
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan - EP 3
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood has never been to Japan. As far as he's concerned, it's a land without bread - and a land without bread, is a land without bakers. This three-part series sees Britain's favourite baker discover just how wrong he was - and how Japan is fast becoming one of the world's top foodie destinations. Across the series, Paul travels the country sampling regional delicacies and gets taught some of Japan's most famous dishes.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan - EP 4
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood has never been to Japan. As far as he's concerned, it's a land without bread - and a land without bread, is a land without bakers. programme.title: Password US S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life are partnered with Jimmy Fallon and other guest celebrities to face off in the ultimate game of words, competing to win up to 25,000 by guessing a secret password from only single-word clues.

programme.title: Chaos Walking
programme.desc: Two unlikely companions embark on a perilous adventure through the badlands of an unexplored planet as they try to escape a dangerous and disorienting reality where all thoughts are seen and heard by everyone.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: A masked e-bike rider preys on lone women across Singapore's neighbourhoods. Watch how officers from Bedok Division work with victims who came forward, to unmask and apprehend this elusive serial offender.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.desc: France and England meet one last time at the FIFA World Cup 2026 with a place on the podium at stake. Packed with world-class talent, attacking quality and national pride, this promises to be a fiercely contested encounter as two football heavyweights battle for third place.

programme.title: Breakout Brothers 3 逃狱兄弟 3
programme.desc: Former prison warden Tang ends up in the slammer himself due to corruption charges. Meanwhile, Ho Chun is back behind bars and still plotting his way out. Ho Chun partners up with Tang in hopes of utilizing the latter's familiarity with the prison to orchestrate an escape. They even try to set up Roller, but in the process Ho Chun realizes that Tang has something else up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 11 寄生
programme.desc: Yun Cong and Xiu Huan embraces each other excitedly as mother and son finally reunites. Yun Cong accompanies Xiu Huan to the supermarket and they meet Shi Yuan. Through their interactions, Xiu Huan sense that the two of them have feelings for each other. Xiu Huan asks Frankie who was the one who framed Zhao Hua and made her take the blame years back, but Frankie was vague about it.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 12 寄生
programme.desc: Xiu Huan discovers the scar on Yun Cong's waist, and that he had donated his kidney to Yun Ze. Xiu Huan was devastated and blames herself for not protecting Yun Cong well. She recalls that Zhao Hua had promised not to hurt Yun Cong, but he obviously did not keep his promise. Xiu Huan was heartbroken thinking about the sufferings Yun Cong had to go through.

programme.title: Hawker Academy - EP 7 小贩学院
programme.desc: The humble Hokkien Mee is the original one-pot dish. For all its simplicity, a pair of strong arms is what makes this mentor's dish appealing. One of our apprentices has literally put his head on the line for this challenge, the stakes are high this week.

programme.title: Thrift Hunters - EP 7 我赚到了
programme.desc: This new program will be introducing a variety of discounts at shops and restaurants, as well as some free activities to our audience. Besides getting more information about saving, the most important thing is, we can gain happiness, health, time, experience and conveniences, in order to make our life more fulfilling and happy.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 9 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Man Ting and Jia Ming lie in ambush at a nearby store. When the pervert appears, both of them attempt to catch him. Man Ting lets him slip away when she panics after he throws raw chicken at her. Both of them contact Shi Tong while chasing after the pervert. They chase him all the way to Lim Chu Kang but only manage to witness him escaping in a speedboat with Yun Yun.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 10 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Jia Ming attempts to help Man Ting overcome her fear of chickens by showing her different chicken cartoons, letting her play with toy chickens and even dressing up as a life-size chicken himself. However, when Man Ting sees the life-size chicken, she freaks out and attacks the chicken, only to realize that it is Jia Ming in disguise. Man Ting is grateful for Jia Ming's sweet gesture, thus increasing their feelings for each other.

programme.title: Old Taste Detective - EP 9 古早味侦探
programme.desc: Originating in Guangzhou, Wanton Mee is one of Singapore's favourite noodle dish. Since last century, the wanton soup has evolved to dry noodles mixed with white, black and red sauces. In this episode, host Yi Feng and Chef Benson recreate the old taste by using a bamboo pole to make the noodles.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Fix My Life - EP 5 整你的人生
programme.desc: Ling Jie is shopping for plastic household items at "Plastic for You". Influenced by the boss, Fang Li Ke's recommendations, Ling Jie selected a large quantity of products. Ling Jie's son Zi Cheng and daughter-in-law Hui Yun try to stop her, and they end up in an argument that implicated She De. She De introduces himself, and offers to help them declutter and organize their house...

programme.title: Fix My Life - EP 6 整你的人生
programme.desc: She De and Man Ying found out that Hui Yun has been relying on plush toys to get over the death of her son. Ling Jie takes extra care of them since then, boiling soup for Hui Yun in hopes she can be pregnant again, but Hui Yun did not appreciate. She De tries to help by forcing Hui Yun to say "I am good even without you" to the plush toys, but this causes her to breakdown instead.

programme.desc: Jia Ming finds a USB inside Man Ting's bag but she claims that it does not belong to her. Jia Ming brings the encrypted USB home and unlocks it. He passes the USB to Xiao Tian when he realises it is Jess' vaccine formula. Now all that is left to be found is the poison gas formula. Jia Hao uses Dr Johnson's family to threaten him into revealing the formula. He relents and gives in.
